headline: Equinix Targets Quantum Safe Security And AI Connectivity Growth Potential
summary: Equinix (NasdaqGS:EQIX) and Sparkle have introduced quantum-safe interconnect solutions across 20 Equinix data centers to address security risks linked to future quantum computing capabilities. Equinix has also expanded its work with Zenlayer to support global AI infrastructure, including integrated offerings aimed at handling distributed AI workloads. For readers following data center and digital infrastructure companies, Equinix sits at the crossroads of cloud, networking, and security,...
